meaning: thank God it's Friday 感谢上帝今天已是星期五
examples: TGIF (Thank God it's Friday) is now here and you just have to get it done.
It was announced that Perfect Strangers would move from TGIF to join this new lineup to help it take off.
But will the skillful use of TGIF make you a good marketing manager? I think not. TGIF is only half the story.
Yes, much to the delight of twentysomething TGIF aficionados everywhere, "Boy Meets World" is getting a reboot.
